recipes.Name: Classic BLT
recipes.Ingredients: Bacon, lettuce, tomato, mayo, sourdough bread
recipes.Instructions: Toast bread. Layer bacon, lettuce, tomato. Spread mayo on top slice. Cut diagonal.

recipes.Name: Turkey Club
recipes.Ingredients: Sliced turkey, bacon, lettuce, tomato, swiss cheese, wheat bread
recipes.Instructions: Layer turkey, bacon, cheese on toasted wheat. Add lettuce, tomato. Triple-deck with toothpick.

recipes.Name: Grilled Cheese Deluxe
recipes.Ingredients: Cheddar, gouda, sourdough bread, butter, tomato slices
recipes.Instructions: Butter bread exterior. Layer cheddar, gouda, tomato inside. Grill on flat top until golden, ~3 min per side.

recipes.Name: Italian Sub
recipes.Ingredients: Salami, capicola, provolone, lettuce, tomato, onion, oil & vinegar, hoagie roll
recipes.Instructions: Slice hoagie lengthwise. Layer meats and cheese. Top with veggies. Drizzle oil & vinegar.

recipes.Name: Veggie Wrap
recipes.Ingredients: Hummus, cucumber, bell pepper, spinach, feta, whole wheat tortilla
recipes.Instructions: Spread hummus on tortilla. Layer veggies and feta. Roll tight, cut in half.

recipes.Name: Philly Cheesesteak
recipes.Ingredients: Shaved ribeye, provolone, onions, peppers, hoagie roll
recipes.Instructions: Sauté onions and peppers. Cook ribeye on flat top. Melt provolone over meat. Scoop into roll.

recipes.Name: Chicken Salad Croissant
recipes.Ingredients: Rotisserie chicken, celery, mayo, grapes, almonds, croissant
recipes.Instructions: Mix shredded chicken with diced celery, halved grapes, mayo, and almonds. Split croissant and fill.

recipes.Name: Tomato Basil Soup
recipes.Ingredients: San Marzano tomatoes, fresh basil, onion, garlic, cream, olive oil
recipes.Instructions: Sauté onion and garlic. Add tomatoes, simmer 20 min. Blend smooth. Stir in cream and basil.

recipes.Name: Chicken Noodle Soup
recipes.Ingredients: Chicken thighs, egg noodles, carrots, celery, onion, chicken broth, thyme
recipes.Instructions: Simmer chicken in broth 25 min. Shred. Sauté mirepoix, add broth, noodles. Cook until tender.

recipes.Name: Loaded Baked Potato Soup
recipes.Ingredients: Russet potatoes, bacon, cheddar, sour cream, chives, butter, flour, milk
recipes.Instructions: Make roux with butter and flour. Add diced potato and milk. Simmer until soft. Top with bacon, cheddar, chives.

recipes.Name: Broccoli Cheddar Soup
recipes.Ingredients: Broccoli, sharp cheddar, onion, butter, flour, chicken broth, milk
recipes.Instructions: Roux base. Add broth and broccoli, simmer 15 min. Blend half, stir in cheddar until melted.

recipes.Name: French Onion Soup
recipes.Ingredients: Yellow onions, beef broth, gruyere, baguette, butter, thyme, red wine
recipes.Instructions: Caramelize onions 40 min. Deglaze with wine. Add broth, simmer. Ladle into crocks, top with bread and gruyere, broil.

recipes.Name: Chili Con Carne
recipes.Ingredients: Ground beef, kidney beans, tomatoes, onion, chili powder, cumin, garlic
recipes.Instructions: Brown beef with onion and garlic. Add tomatoes, beans, spices. Simmer 45 min. Serve with cornbread.

recipes.Name: Caesar Side Salad
recipes.Ingredients: Romaine, parmesan, croutons, caesar dressing
recipes.Instructions: Chop romaine. Toss with dressing. Top with parmesan and croutons.

recipes.Name: Coleslaw
recipes.Ingredients: Green cabbage, carrots, mayo, apple cider vinegar, sugar, celery seed
recipes.Instructions: Shred cabbage and carrots. Mix dressing ingredients. Toss and refrigerate 1 hour.

recipes.Name: Chips & Dip
recipes.Ingredients: Kettle chips, french onion dip
recipes.Instructions: Portion chips into basket. Serve dip in ramekin on the side.

recipes.Name: Fresh Lemonade
recipes.Ingredients: Lemons, sugar, water, ice
recipes.Instructions: Juice lemons. Make simple syrup. Mix juice, syrup, water. Serve over ice with lemon wheel.

recipes.Name: Iced Tea
recipes.Ingredients: Black tea bags, sugar, water, ice, lemon
recipes.Instructions: Steep 6 bags in hot water 5 min. Sweeten. Dilute with cold water. Serve over ice.

recipes.Name: Reuben
recipes.Ingredients: Corned beef, sauerkraut, swiss cheese, thousand island, rye bread
recipes.Instructions: Layer corned beef, kraut, swiss on rye. Spread thousand island. Grill both sides until golden.

recipes.Name: Clam Chowder
recipes.Ingredients: Clams, potatoes, onion, celery, bacon, cream, butter, flour
recipes.Instructions: Render bacon. Sauté veg. Roux, add clam juice and potatoes. Simmer. Add clams and cream last 5 min.

customer-feedback.Meal Ordered: Tomato Basil Soup + Grilled Cheese Deluxe
customer-feedback.Comments: Best combo in town! The soup is always perfect.
Great sub, generous portions. Bread could be fresher.
Just like grandma used to make. So comforting!
Good sandwich but waited 20 minutes. Busy lunch rush.
The cheesesteak is unbelievable. Worth the drive across town.
Nice healthy options. The hummus is clearly homemade.
My kids love this soup. We come every Saturday.
Bacon was overcooked. Not great today.
The croissant was flaky and buttery. Lemonade is refreshing.
Hearty and flavorful. Great cornbread on the side.
Rich and creamy. Generous with the toppings.
Moved here from Philly. This is the real deal.
Good but small. Could use more filling for the price.
French onion is incredible. Staff was super friendly.
Soup and slaw combo was a great lunch. Will be back.
